carpet-sru-addition.rule.allaySilentReso: If enabled, note blocks blocked by a block above will still emit the note block game event for Allays.
carpet-sru-addition.rule.allayAiFreezeEn: Freezes idle Allay AI when no visible player or liked note block is nearby.
carpet-sru-addition.rule.allayThrowCoold: Overrides the allay item pickup cooldown after throwing. Use -1 for vanilla (60 ticks).
Prevents items thrown by Allays from being picked up by any Allay for 3 seconds (60 ticks), avoiding pickup loops when throw cooldown is short.
carpet-sru-addition.rule.allayMaxHearing: Overrides the maximum distance at which Allays can hear note blocks. Use -1 for vanilla (16 blocks).
carpet-sru-addition.rule.renewableDragon: Allows dragon breath clouds to be renewed through SRU dragon egg interactions.
carpet-sru-addition.rule.freezingTickNoS: Prevents Carpet fake players from taking starvation damage while game ticks are frozen.
carpet-sru-addition.rule.commandHat.name: Hat Command
carpet-sru-addition.rule.commandHat.desc: Enables the /hat command. Ported from Vulpeus Carpet, originally from essential addons.
carpet-sru-addition.rule.commandSit.name: Sit Command
carpet-sru-addition.rule.commandSit.desc: Enables the /sit command. Ported from Vulpeus Carpet, originally from PCA.
carpet-sru-addition.rule.limitTntRandomM: Limits TNT random momentum using the SRU configured angle list.
carpet-sru-addition.rule.visibleSpectato: Makes spectators visible for SRU server gameplay compatibility.
